title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Zoro, Nami, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this rate, we'll still be looking after sundown.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just how big is this castle?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: those guards were no help either...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, the only ones who'd probably know where to find what we're looking for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...are a few of the gray boards- like Elder JARUL...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if he'd tell me if I asked.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just trying to free LOKI is a heinous crime!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We haven't decided if we're gonna let him go yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mark of nobility... could that be the throne room?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's a hole in the ceiling!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is the throne room, all right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm?! But I must say, what is the meaning of this mark?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've seen these in books before! It looks like a magic circle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They apparently use them in rituals to summon demons in some countries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's this thing doing here in the throne room?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel like I saw something like this recently...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who's there?! is it a demon?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must say, it couldn't be a vengeful spirit, could it?!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
